title: Stargaze
description: Stargaze is a modpack built around vanilla-style mods! it intends to complement and enhance vanilla gameplay
body: --- # ⭐ Stargaze – Vanilla, But Better **Stargaze** is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly modpack designed to elevate your Minecraft experience without changing the soul of the game. Focused on performance, visuals, and subtle quality-of-life improvements, Stargaze enhances every aspect of gameplay while keeping the familiar feel you love. Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, Stargaze brings out the best of vanilla Minecraft—smooth, responsive, and more immersive than ever. --- ## ✨ Why Choose Stargaze? ### 🔧 Fully Vanilla-Compatible Stargaze contains **no server-side mods**, meaning you can join: - Any **vanilla Minecraft server** - **Minecraft Realms** - SMP worlds with friends who aren’t using mods All without issues or mismatched gameplay. ### 🚀 Performance-Driven Enjoy dramatically smoother gameplay with client-side optimizations that: - Improve FPS - Reduce stutters and load times - Enhance stability and responsiveness Once you try it, you’ll never want to play plain vanilla again. ### 🌿 Enhanced Vanilla Experience Every mod in Stargaze is carefully selected to: - Maintain Minecraft’s classic look and feel - Add subtle improvements to UI, world ambience, and controls - Provide optional visual upgrades without changing core gameplay --- ## 🕒 Always Up-to-Date Stargaze is updated **as quickly as possible** to each new Minecraft release once Fabric and its ecosystem are ready. You’ll always be able to enjoy the latest features with the best performance.
